allowed_guarded_actions.instruction: Wash out the mouth thoroughly with water.

escalation.instruction: Seek immediate medical attention after mouth rinse.

immediate_actions.instruction: Bilas mulut secara menyeluruh dengan air.

escalate_now.instruction: Segera cari bantuan medis setelah membilas mulut.
escalate_now.reason: Paparan bahan kimia berbahaya melalui saluran pencernaan memerlukan penanganan medis segera.
